payment_records_url_len_check.name: payment_records_url_len_check
payment_records_url_len_check.value: "payment_records"."url" IS NULL OR char_length("payment_records"."url") BETWEEN 0 AND 2048

endpoint_health_checks_failure_reason_ch.name: endpoint_health_checks_failure_reason_check
endpoint_health_checks_failure_reason_ch.value: ("endpoint_health_checks"."is_healthy" = true AND "endpoint_health_checks"."failure_reason" IS NULL) OR ("endpoint_health_checks"."is_healthy" = false AND "endpoint_health_checks"."failure_reason" IN ('timeout','http_error','network_error','ssrf_blocked'))
